text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Good morning. There are six days and one minute left until the
contest.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Our goal is to start on a design and finalize it within the day. Let's
keep up the good work together.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Sorry to interrupt, but I don't see Flower anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, sorry. She said she had to put on the ribbons, so she's running a
bit late.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: What ribbons?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sorry I'm late!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Flash? Bourbon? Please have these... if you like! Jordan helped
me make them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You made cakes based on us, so I thought that if you had something
based on yourselves too, it might give you a new perspective for
ideas!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And, well... The main reason is that I was happy you made a cake for
me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We only have a little longer to work on this, but I'm having so much
fun! Thank you for inviting me to join you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you for helping us. Hehe, do I really look that serious?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, good going, Flower! Oh! Why don't you put them here together
with ours?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yo, this is fire! Can I post it on Umastagram?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Excellent!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Excuse me. My status was "excited" for a brief moment there.
Excellent work, Flower. You gave me an idea.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you! Um...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A cake that represents our desire to win. How about a cupcake tower
where each cupcake is modeled on us?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
We could put the cupcakes on pedestals, representing the students
winning and Tracen Academy's spirit for victory.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I see! Yes, that would certainly portray both ideas, and we could
execute it within the time limit.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: A cupcake tower... Let's proceed with that! Thank you, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Heh, not at all! I-I'm... glad I helped. Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the final six-day stretch begins...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
How shall we make each cupcake different? Let's take today to study
cake designs in this cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Status—"thinking." Update—I have an idea. Just like this tart, we
could make part of our cake out of something other than sponge.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I see! Something like... zuckerteig, or hefeteig. Namely, a biscuit base
or a fermented dough. That's not a bad idea!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely not! An overly sparkly decoration for the cups would be
far too showy to represent the students of Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Come on, isn't it better to be a bit extra? Yours is too basic!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It is not! It is a clean and refined design befitting our students!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... Then how about purple, like our uniforms?

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text:
That's the one!
That's it!

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
The fierce competition begins once again at this year's Spring Choice
Chocolatier Contest!

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
Seventeen teams are participating, but who will win the grand prize
and go home with the dazzling crown? Let the baking begin!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All right! Go get 'em, besties!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bake Bakushin-style out there! Flash! Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Toi, toi, toi... Exhale... Bourbon, let's aim for nothing less than first place. I'm counting on you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. I will work at full capacity.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Mixing bowl, whisk, cream, temperature—all okay. Setup complete. I
will now combine the milk fat globules with air.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You've improved a lot, Bourbon. Ah, I had better start on the cake
batter.

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
Next up, Tracen Academy! They are making steady progress, wouldn't
you say?

text_block_list.name: Judge
text_block_list.text:
Yes... It's rare for this contest to have entrants from a racing school. I
believe they don't even have a confectionery course.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Proceeding to the matcha cream, page twenty-three of the recipe. At
present, the color is slightly different from what's written in the
recipe.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In that case, add one gram of matcha and 4.2 grams of granulated
sugar.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Flash, the oven will finish preheating in forty-two
seconds.

text_block_list.name: Judge
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a meticulous recipe. I get the feeling we can expect
something special from these two.
